steps.title: Wash wells with PBS-EDTA 0
steps.instruction: Wash wells with PBS-EDTA 0.5mM (e.g., 0.5 mL per well of a 12-well-plate; recline the cells from tube rack to disturb the neurons as little as possible). Aspirate.

steps.title: Add 1/4 of well volume of papain-HBSS-EDTA-HEPES solution (e
steps.instruction: Add 1/4 of well volume of papain-HBSS-EDTA-HEPES solution (e.g., 250 µL per well of a 12-well-plate or 125 µL per well of a 24-well-plate)

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C for 10-15 min...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C for 10-15 min in shaker at 125 rpm (bacterial shaker taped or inside metal holders). Tap cells on the side every 5 min.

steps.title: Pipette cell clumps up and down to break cells
steps.instruction: Pipette cell clumps up and down to break cells.

steps.title: Transfer dissociated cells to a 15...
steps.instruction: Transfer dissociated cells to a 15 mL tube plate with 6 mL of DMEM-10%FBS (2 volume dilution of papain) and wash wells with 5 mL (e.g., 400 µL /well of a 12-well-plate)

steps.title: 3 mL cells suspension+ 6 mL...
steps.instruction: 3 mL cells suspension+ 6 mL Medium+ 5 mL Medium wash for each plate.

steps.title: NOTE
steps.instruction: NOTE: There should almost no cell clumps.

steps.title: Spin at 600g, 5 min, RT
steps.instruction: Spin at 600g, 5 min, RT. Decant medium by inverting the tube.

steps.title: Resuspend in 1-2 mL of DMEM-10%FBS/plate
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 1-2 mL of DMEM-10%FBS/plate.

steps.title: Pass cells through strainer on top...
steps.instruction: Pass cells through strainer on top of a 15 mL tube.

steps.title: Wash w
steps.instruction: Wash w. PBS ((-Ca/-Mg) twice
0.5 mL Accutase, w/Rock inhibitor, 37°C, ~25 min, frequent agitation

steps.title: Wash medium w/FBS, and add 15 mL conical tube,
steps.instruction: Wash medium w/FBS, and add 15 mL conical tube,

steps.title: Spin, 300 g, 5min, 4°C, aspirate sup,
steps.instruction: Spin, 300 g, 5min, 4°C, aspirate sup,

steps.title: Re-suspended in neuron media w
steps.instruction: Re-suspended in neuron media w. 10% FBS and Ri.

steps.title: Spin, 300 g, 5min, RT, remove sup
steps.instruction: Spin, 300 g, 5min, RT, remove sup

steps.title: Add 100 µL staining buffer (2%BSA/0
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL staining buffer (2%BSA/0.02% tween20, RNAase inhibitor)

steps.title: Add 10 µL FcX
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL FcX. resuspend, 10min, 4C (Fc block)

steps.title: Add 2 µL (1µg) hashing Ab...
steps.instruction: Add 2 µL (1µg) hashing Ab for each sample, 30min, @4C

steps.title: Wash w
steps.instruction: Wash w.1 mL staining buffer, spin, 300 g, 5 min,

steps.title: Repeat washing 3 times
steps.instruction: Repeat washing 3 times.

steps.title: Ensure >60% viability
steps.instruction: Ensure >60% viability

steps.title: Counting
steps.instruction: Counting: 2.5 µL cell suspension + 2.5 µL staining buffer (1:2 dilution) + 5 µL Trypanblue
